title: The Missing Market Bell
synopsis: When Ivy tells a small lie about knowing where the festival bell is hidden, she must search through the busy market to find it before everyone discovers the truth. Along the way, she makes unexpected friends who help her solve the mystery.

pages.text: Three silver bells ring every morning at the market. Today only two bells ring. Mrs. Plum looks worried. 'Where is the festival bell?' she asks. 'Tomorrow is the Harvest Festival. We need all three bells.' Ivy knows she should say nothing. But the words pop out anyway. 'I know where it is,' Ivy says. Mrs. Plum smiles big. 'Wonderful! Please bring it back by sunset.' Now Ivy feels sick. She doesn't know where the bell is at all.

illustration.description: A busy market fountain square with two silver bells hanging from posts, ringing in the morning light. A worried elderly woman in an apron (Mrs. Plum) speaks to a girl with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, and big brown eyes (Ivy). Market stalls surround the fountain with vendors setting up colorful fruits, flowers, and festival decorations. Steam rises from food carts. Birds perch on awnings. Hidden among the scene are small bell shapes and a crumpled map on the ground.
illustration.alt: Market fountain square with two bells ringing while woman talks to young girl

pages.text: Ivy draws a map on her napkin. She marks five places to search. First stop: the spice stall. Mr. Cardamom has pointy ears and green fingers. His spices float in jars by themselves. 'Looking for something?' he asks. His cinnamon sticks are doing a little dance. 'The festival bell,' Ivy says. 'Someone might have hidden it here.' Mr. Cardamom's eyebrows wiggle. 'I heard Greta the bread baker talking about bells yesterday.' He points down the market row. 'Try the bakery.' Ivy marks her map with a big X.

illustration.description: A magical spice merchant's stall overflowing with floating jars of colorful spices, dancing cinnamon sticks, and glowing herb bundles. The merchant with pointy ears and green fingers gestures toward another stall. A girl with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, and big brown eyes holds a hand-drawn napkin map. Spice containers are labeled with tiny writing, measuring spoons hang everywhere, and there are small bell-shaped spice shakers hidden throughout the busy, organized display.
illustration.alt: Magical spice stall with floating ingredients and merchant helping girl with map

pages.text: The bakery smells like warm honey and fresh bread. Greta has flour in her purple hair. Her mixing bowls stir themselves. 'Hello, little detective,' she says. 'Looking for the bell?' Ivy nods. Her cheeks feel hot. 'I didn't take it,' Greta laughs. 'But I saw something strange. Someone with a big hat was near the bell tower at midnight.' She hands Ivy a warm roll. 'Check the flower stall. Rosa sees everything.' Ivy takes a bite. The roll tastes like sunshine.

illustration.description: A cozy bakery corner with self-stirring mixing bowls, floating rolling pins, and shelves full of golden breads and pastries. A baker with purple hair and flour-dusted apron hands a warm roll to a girl with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, and big brown eyes. Steam rises from ovens, measuring cups organize themselves, flour bags are stacked high, and tiny bell-shaped cookies are hidden among the detailed baked goods and kitchen tools scattered throughout the busy scene.
illustration.alt: Magical bakery with self-stirring bowls and baker giving roll to girl

pages.text: Rosa's flowers sing quiet songs. She has petals in her braided hair. 'I know why you're here,' Rosa says. Her roses hum a little tune. 'Someone in a big hat was definitely here last night. They were carrying something heavy and shiny.' Rosa's sunflowers turn to look at Ivy. 'But I think the hat person was trying to help, not steal.' She gives Ivy a daisy that glows. 'The cheese stall knows more. Old Henrik notices everything.' Ivy puts the glowing daisy behind her ear.

illustration.description: A magical flower garden stall with singing roses, humming sunflowers that turn their faces to follow movement, and glowing daisies. The flower seller with petals in her braided hair tends to her musical blooms. A girl with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, and big brown eyes holds a glowing daisy to her ear. Watering cans float above, tiny bells hang from flower stems, seed packets are organized in rows, and small bell-shaped blooms are hidden throughout the densely packed, colorful garden display.
illustration.alt: Flower stall with singing plants and woman giving glowing daisy to girl

chapters.title: The Cheese Stall and the Truth

pages.text: Henrik's cheeses roll around his stall like pets. He has a long white beard. 'Ah, the bell mystery!' he says. His wheels of cheese spin in circles. 'The person in the big hat was me. The bell rope was breaking. I took it to fix it safely.' He points under his stall. There sits the festival bell, polished and beautiful. 'I was going to surprise everyone this morning.' Ivy feels terrible. 'I lied,' she says. 'I didn't know where it was.' Henrik smiles. 'But you found it anyway. And you made friends helping.' He's right. Mr. Cardamom waves from his stall. Greta holds up fresh cookies. Rosa's flowers sing Ivy's name. Sometimes the best adventures start with mistakes.

illustration.description: A busy cheese stall with wheels of cheese rolling around like pets, aged cheese wheels stacked high, and an elderly man with a long white beard pointing under his stall where a beautiful silver festival bell sits polished and gleaming. A girl with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, and big brown eyes looks relieved. In the background, the spice merchant, baker, and flower seller wave from their stalls. Small bell patterns are carved into cheese wheels, and tiny measuring tools, cheese knives, and bell-shaped cheese molds are scattered throughout the detailed, organized stall display.
illustration.alt: Cheese stall with rolling cheese wheels and discovered festival bell under counter

metadata.illustrationStyle: detailed hidden objects, visual clues, busy organized composition

coverPrompt.description: A bustling open-air market scene with colorful stalls, hanging lanterns, and festival decorations. In the center, a girl with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, and big brown eyes stands looking determined while holding a hand-drawn map. Market vendors of various magical creatures are setting up their booths around her. Hidden throughout the scene are small bells and clues.
coverPrompt.alt: Girl with map standing in busy magical market preparing for festival

questions.question: Why was Mrs. Plum worried at the beginning?
questions.explanation: Mrs. Plum was worried because only two of the three market bells rang that morning, and the festival bell was missing just before the Harvest Festival.

questions.question: What did Ivy lie about?
questions.explanation: Ivy lied when she told Mrs. Plum that she knew where the festival bell was hidden, even though she had no idea where it was.

questions.question: Who actually took the festival bell?
questions.explanation: Henrik the cheese seller took the bell because he noticed the rope was breaking and wanted to fix it safely as a surprise.

questions.question: What made Rosa's flowers special?
questions.explanation: Rosa's flowers were magical - they sang quiet songs, hummed tunes, and could even sing people's names.

questions.question: How did Ivy feel at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: Even though Ivy had lied, she felt good because she made new friends while searching for the bell and learned that sometimes mistakes can lead to good things.
